newLaunches.name: Google Pixel 8
newLaunches.description: Google Pixel 8 combines a bright OLED display, powerful Google Tensor performance and an advanced camera system for everyday photos, video and productivity.

newLaunches.name: Google Watch 2
newLaunches.description: Google Watch 2 helps you track health, workouts, notifications and daily activity with a clean design and comfortable fit.

newLaunches.name: Google Buds 2
newLaunches.description: Google Buds 2 deliver compact wireless audio, clear calls and convenient controls for music, calls and everyday listening.

newLaunches.name: Apple Macbook Air
newLaunches.description: Apple MacBook Air is a thin and lightweight laptop for study, work and entertainment with excellent battery life and smooth performance.

newLaunches.name: Signature Acoustics
newLaunches.description: Signature Acoustics headphones provide balanced sound, comfortable listening and reliable audio quality for daily use.
